name: proyecto-viviana-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Proyecto Viviana SolidJS libraries

scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run build:stately && bun run build:solidaria && bun run build:components && bun run build:silapse
scripts.test:e2e: bun run --cwd apps/web bunx playwright test
scripts.a11y:axe:aa: RUN_AXE=1 bun run --cwd apps/web bunx playwright test e2e/playground-axe.spec.ts -g "WCAG 2.2 AA" --reporter=line
scripts.a11y:axe:playground: RUN_AXE=1 AXE_INCLUDE_CONTRAST=1 bun run --cwd apps/web bunx playwright test e2e/playground-axe.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.a11y:smoke: bun run --cwd apps/web bunx playwright test e2e/docs-menu.spec.ts e2e/playground-components.spec.ts e2e/calendar-regression.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.a11y:check: bun run a11y:axe:aa && bun run a11y:smoke
scripts.a11y:full: bun run a11y:axe:playground && bun run a11y:smoke
scripts.typecheck:web: bun run build && bunx tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck:all: bun run typecheck && bun run typecheck:web
scripts.bench:all: bun run bench:bundle && bun run bench:runtime && bun run bench:vitals
scripts.ci:release-readiness: bun run build && bun run test:run
scripts.pr:check:fast: bun run ci:changesets && bun run ci:release-readiness
scripts.pr:check: bun run pr:check:fast && bun run ci:a11y
scripts.release:prepare: bun run changeset:version && bun run ci:release-readiness
scripts.release: bun run release:prepare && bun run release:publish
